title: Approved Change — ECR-225: GCS software architecture v2
text:
Engineering Change Notice ECN-320. Implements ECR-225.
Approved by: Felix Herrera, 2024-10-30.

Authorised changes:
1. SRC-001 (gcs_main.py): Archived at v1.8.4. No longer maintained.
2. SRC-002 (gcs_telemetry.py): Refactored into SRC-024 backend service.
3. SRC-024 (gcs_ui_backend.py): New asyncio Python backend. Owns all drone communications via P-1167 (GCS Radio Unit). Exposes WebSocket API on localhost:8765.
4. SRC-025 (gcs_map_layer.py): Replaced by JavaScript Leaflet component in frontend.
5. DOC-479 (GCS Software Architecture Document): Created, Jordan Kim, 2024-11-15.
6. GCS frontend: Vue.js SPA, served by SRC-024, accessing drone state via WebSocket.
7. P-1167 (GCS Radio Unit): Interface now managed exclusively by SRC-024. MAVLink dialect unchanged.
8. Integration with SRC-018 (encryption_handler.c): SRC-024 calls SRC-018 via Python ctypes. Session key management handled in SRC-024.
